name: Weekly Review
description: Summarize the week's merged PRs, closed issues, research findings, and security posture

steps.action: For each repo in shared/repos.json: list PRs merged this week (`gh pr list --state merged --search 'merged:>={{7_DAYS_AGO}}'`), closed issues, notable commits, and current CI status. Write findings to shared/inbox/main/ with subject 'Weekly Dev Summary'.
Compile this week's notable research findings from memory files and FreshRSS. Highlight top 3-5 items worth remembering. Write to shared/inbox/main/ with subject 'Weekly Research Summary'.

Compile this week's notable AI research findings: new model releases, significant papers, industry moves. Highlight top 3-5 items. Write to shared/inbox/main/ with subject 'Weekly AI Research Summary'.
Compile this week's security posture: any alerts triggered, scans completed, open issues, and current threat landscape. Write to shared/inbox/main/ with subject 'Weekly Security Summary'.

Read weekly summaries from dev, research, ai-research, and security. Compile into a 'Week in Review' report covering: (1) code shipped, (2) issues resolved, (3) notable research/news, (4) security posture, (5) upcoming priorities. Send to Anthony via Telegram.
